final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a Korean café-style coffee and dessert setup, smartphone photography aesthetic for Instagram.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Korean café aesthetic, Instagram-ready, hand-drawn annotation overlay
Composition: flat-lay or slightly angled overhead shot, no people
Subject: coffee drink and dessert on café table
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior or table setting
Lighting/mood: natural daylight, soft and warm
Color palette: warm, muted tones typical of Korean café aesthetics
Materials/textures: ceramic cup, dessert pastry, wooden table or marble surface
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: no people in frame, hand-drawn white line annotations with Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), rough sketchy contour lines around objects, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance, comments about taste/temperature/texture/atmosphere, steam sparkles hearts small emoji decorations, Instagram story style, magazine rough notes style, fashionable and relaxed mood, intentional negative space
Avoid:
